---
title: "Cribb Notes"
subtitle: "Feels like magic, but it's math."
title-block-banner: "#0A1F41"
title-block-banner-color: "white"
page-layout: full
listing:
  id: latest
  contents: "notes"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, description, reading-time, categories]
---

Short, plain-language notes on the stuff everyone in tech pretends to already
understand — AI mostly, plus the enterprise systems we actually run companies on,
the way IT, the movie business, and education are getting rewired in real time,
and the occasional detour through the human side of it all.

One idea per note. About a three-minute read. No prerequisites, no jargon, no *"well, actually."*

::: {#latest}
:::
